title: Question: Matching AST patterns
body:
---


Author Name: **Jeremy Bennett** (@jeremybennett)
Original Redmine Message: 1122 from https://www.veripool.org



---

I'm working on some algorithms where I need to match particular patterns of AST. In one example I need to match an ASSIGNW where the left hand side is a 1-bit variable and the right hand size is an expression combining a 1-bit variable with AND or OR and an expression. Things like:

```
assign x = y & z[0:0];
assign a = b[3:3] | c;

```

I can clearly find any of these "by steam", but what I would really like is a general purpose pattern matcher - rather like a scanf for ASTs.

Does anything like this already exist in Verilator. Or should I be taking a different approach?
code_blocks:
assign x = y & z[0:0];
assign a = b[3:3] | c;
